name: Esdeath
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7) Esdeath is a high-ranking general of the Empire, and leader of the Jaegers. She enjoys torturing her enemies slowly, seen when she used her Teigu to put large blocks of ice in a cauldron so that the people inside would die slower and suffer more. Despite her sadistic actions, she is actually shown to have a compassionate heart when it comes to the lives of her men and others close to her. name: Cid Kagenou
description: __Race:__ Human Cid Kagenou, under the moniker of "Shadow," is the founder and leader of the secret organization "Shadow Garden." He founded the organization to help realize his fantasy of becoming an “Eminence in Shadow". However, unbeknownst to him, his fabrications are often revealed to be quite genuine in reality. Cid is the reincarnation of Minoru Kagenou. (Source: The Eminence in Shadow Wiki)

name: Hyakkimaru
description: Hyakkimaru is the central character of Tezuka's best-known samurai story, Dororo. A powerful warrior, Hyakkimaru is traveling on a long quest to retrieve 48 parts of his body which were sold to demons by his father at his birth. This is a very dramatic adventure series, with a great variety of unusual mythological creatures and demons, as well as bandits and other fierce foes. name: Death the Kid
description: The son of [Death](https://anilist.co/character/8457/Shinigami) himself and the Meister of the Demon Twin Guns, [Liz Thompson](https://anilist.co/character/8445/Elizabeth-Thompson) and [Patty Thompson](https://anilist.co/character/8444/Patricia-Thompson). Created from a piece of Death's soul, Death the Kid is known to be one of the top 3 students in the DWMA, albeit with a confounding obsession when it comes to symmetry.

name: Minato Namikaze
description: __Height:__ 179cm (5'10") Minato Namikaze was the Fourth Hokage of Konohagakure and the man responsible for sealing the nine-tailed demon fox inside Naruto Uzumaki when he was born.
